rfps.summary: DEFINITION OF THE REQUIREMENT , Objective , , Document, sample, recover and transport St. Lawrence Estuary beluga carcasses to determine cause of death. , , Context , , Each year, more than 1400 cases concerning marine mammals that are either dead or ill are reported to the Réseau Québécois d’Urgence pour les Mammifères Marins (RQUMM). portals.name: CanadaBuys
portals.notes: Federal Canada tenders. Login: ashley@edgewiseenvironmental.com (BitWarden). Scraper covers this. Search terms: 70101602, 70100000, 81171500, 77101500, DFO, marine mammal, seabird, marine renewable, PWGSC, DND. Filters: Services, Open, BC, Indigenous Lands, NB, NL, NS, NWT, NU, PEI, QC, YT.

portals.name: UK Find a Tender
portals.notes: UK above-threshold contracts (>~£139k). Scraper covers this.

portals.name: UK Contracts Finder
portals.notes: UK below-threshold contracts. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: TED - Tenders Electronic Daily (EU)
portals.notes: All EU above-threshold public procurement. Catches Irish, Norwegian, Dutch, Belgian and other European offshore wind and marine environmental work. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: SAM.gov (US Federal)
portals.notes: US federal procurement. Key buyers: BOEM (offshore wind MMO/PAM), NOAA Fisheries, USACE (coastal EIA), NSF (polar marine). Scraper covers this using DEMO_KEY (30 req/hr limit, sufficient for daily run).

portals.name: SPREP - Tenders
portals.notes: Pacific Regional Environment Programme. Scraped via Playwright headless Chromium (JS-rendered Drupal page). Low volume but directly on-priority for Pacific seabird/marine work.

portals.name: World Bank - Procurement Notices
portals.notes: Global multilateral procurement. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: International Maritime Organisation
portals.notes: Maritime tenders. Highly relevant for marine acoustic / underwater work. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: Caribbean Development Bank
portals.notes: General Procurement Notices. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: BC Bid
portals.notes: BC public sector procurement. Browse public, login to bid. Covers BC Hydro and many other BC entities. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: BC Hydro - Bid Opportunities
portals.notes: BC Hydro posts all opportunities on BC Bid - this is the explainer page. Already covered by BC Bid scraper.

portals.name: NL Hydro - Bids and Tenders
portals.notes: Login: kyla.graham@edgewiseenvironmental.com (BitWarden). Owner: Kyla. Scraper covers this. Login only required to bid, not to view.

portals.name: Gov of Nova Scotia - Procurement
portals.notes: Public listings. My NS Account needed to bid. Not currently registered (per tracker). Scraper covers this.

portals.name: Government of Nunavut - RFTP
portals.notes: Scraped via nunavuttenders.ca (same data as gov.nu.ca/en/business/tenders but without Cloudflare). Captures GN environmental services, wildlife surveys, marine infrastructure, Arctic logistics. Login needed to submit bids only.

portals.name: BC Ferries - Procurement
portals.notes: Some opportunities on own page, some on BC Bid. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: LNG Canada - Procurement
portals.notes: Marine environmental work around the Kitimat LNG terminal. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: MERX - Government of NL
portals.notes: Listing public; bid documents may have a Pay-as-you-go cost. Not currently registered (per tracker). Scraper covers this.

portals.name: Government of Yukon - Bids
portals.notes: bidsandtenders.ca platform. Re-checked May 2026: JS-rendered with no public RSS or open AJAX endpoint. Landlocked territory - low marine yield. Manual browse only.

portals.name: SAP Ariba
portals.notes: Login: ashley@edgewiseenvironmental.com (BitWarden). Auth-walled, scraper cannot reach.

portals.name: BOEM - Offshore Wind Environmental Studies
portals.notes: US Bureau of Ocean Energy Management. Re-checked May 2026: original studies page is 404; only a general newsroom RSS exists, no procurement feed. Biddable items go via SAM.gov (already scraped). Manual watch only.

portals.name: Ørsted - Supplier Hub
portals.notes: Major offshore wind developer - active buyer of MMO/PAM/seabird observer services. Supplier registration required. Login via Achilles FPAL/JQS pre-qualification.

portals.name: RWE - Supplier Portal
portals.notes: Active in UK and US offshore wind. Major buyer of environmental monitoring services. Supplier registration required.

portals.name: SSE Renewables - Suppliers
portals.notes: UK offshore wind developer. Environmental services tenders go via SSE supplier portal or Find a Tender. Register as a supplier to receive direct ITTs.

portals.name: Vattenfall - Suppliers
portals.notes: UK/EU offshore wind developer. Environmental monitoring and MMO/PAM work. Supplier registration via Achilles or in-house portal.

portals.name: Equinor - Supplier Portal
portals.notes: Norwegian state O&G and offshore wind operator. Active in UK North Sea and US East Coast offshore wind. Pre-qualification via Achilles FPAL/JQS. Auth-walled.

portals.name: Achilles FPAL / JQS
portals.notes: Oil and gas pre-qualification database. Gate to most North Sea and Atlantic Canada offshore operator work (Equinor, Shell, Cenovus, Suncor, ExxonMobil Canada). Registration gives visibility to operator procurement teams.

portals.name: Sofia Offshore Wind - Supplier Portal
portals.notes: Auth-walled. Browse company info publicly; supplier portal needs login.

portals.name: ABCMI Login
portals.notes: Members-only industry association. Auth-walled.

portals.name: Marine Management Organisation (UK)
portals.notes: UK MMO. Re-checked May 2026: dedicated procurement page is 404. All procurement now goes via Find a Tender (already scraped). No standalone feed.

portals.name: JNCC - Joint Nature Conservation Committee
portals.notes: UK statutory PAM/MMO guidelines authority. Re-checked May 2026: contracts-and-tenders page is 404. All procurement goes via Find a Tender (already scraped).

portals.name: Cefas - Procurement
portals.notes: UK marine science contractor. Re-checked May 2026: procurement page is 404. Procurement goes via Find a Tender (already scraped).

portals.name: Energy Research & Innovation NL
portals.notes: Re-checked May 2026: site bot-protected, no listings page. News section only - manual browse.

portals.name: AllNewfoundland and Labrador
portals.notes: NL aggregator. Re-checked May 2026: no tender feed or structured listings. Manual browse only.

portals.name: ElWind Project
portals.notes: Re-checked May 2026: domain no longer resolves. Treat as defunct.

portals.name: Piranha Offshore Wind
portals.notes: Re-checked May 2026: domain no longer resolves. Treat as defunct.

portals.name: Agnico Eagle - Suppliers
portals.notes: Contact page only - no listings. Manual outreach.

portals.name: COSEWIC
portals.notes: News and events only - no procurement listings. Manual watch.

portals.name: EnergyNL
portals.notes: Industry assoc. Login: ashley@edgewiseenvironmental.com (BitWarden). Member portal.

portals.name: Marine Renewables Canada
portals.notes: Industry assoc. BitWarden for login. Member portal has opportunities.

portals.name: EcoNext NL
portals.notes: Clean Growth NL accelerator. Re-checked May 2026: no tender feed. Manual browse.

portals.name: EnergiCoast
portals.notes: UK industry assoc. Login: info@edgewiseenvironmental.com (BitWarden). Owner: Ashley.

portals.name: OceansAdvance
portals.notes: NL ocean tech industry assoc. Re-checked May 2026: news/membership only, no tender feed.

portals.name: Fundy Energy Research Network
portals.notes: Bay of Fundy research consortium. Re-checked May 2026: research/career announcements only, no tender feed.

portals.name: IMAREST
portals.notes: Institute of Marine Engineering, Science and Technology. Re-checked May 2026: jobs/membership only, no tender feed.

portals.name: NLOWE
portals.notes: NL Organization for Women Entrepreneurs. Member portal.

portals.name: PCS Scotland
portals.notes: Public Contracts Scotland. Crown Estate Scotland posts ALL tenders here. Also NatureScot, Marine Scotland, ScotWind-adjacent local authorities. Scraper uses CPV-filtered RSS feeds.

portals.name: NBON - New Brunswick Opportunities Network
portals.notes: NB Power (Point Lepreau coastal monitoring), DNRED Fisheries and Aquaculture, Bay of Fundy, Saint John Harbour. Login needed for documents; listings are public. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: GNWT Contract Opportunities
portals.notes: Government of Northwest Territories. Inuvialuit Settlement Region, Beaufort Sea, GNWT Environment and Climate Change. Scraper uses OpenNWT mirror (contracts.opennwt.ca) for structured data.

portals.name: SEAO Quebec
portals.notes: Système électronique d'appel d'offres. Hydro-Québec, Société du Plan Nord, MELCCFP (environment ministry), Gulf of St. Lawrence municipalities. Scraper fetches weekly JSON from Données Québec open-data catalog. Titles in French.

portals.name: eTenders Ireland
portals.notes: Irish public procurement. Marine Institute Ireland, MARA (Maritime Area Regulatory Authority), NPWS, Inland Fisheries Ireland. Celtic Sea floating-wind consenting work. Scraper uses OCDS feed via data.gov.ie.

portals.name: Sell2Wales
portals.notes: Welsh public procurement. Natural Resources Wales (NRW), Welsh Government Marine Directorate, Celtic Sea floating-wind area authorities. Same Proactis platform as PCS Scotland. Scraper uses CPV-filtered RSS feeds.

portals.name: Crown Estate (England/Wales/NI)
portals.notes: Notices crosspost to UK Find a Tender (already scraped). Full docs require SourceDogg supplier registration. Key buyer for offshore wind and marine environmental work.

portals.name: Crown Estate Scotland
portals.notes: All notices on Public Contracts Scotland (now scraped via PCS Scotland scraper). This page is the explainer - the scraper covers it.

portals.name: C-NLOPB
portals.notes: Canada-Newfoundland and Labrador Offshore Petroleum Board. Regulatory body - publishes EAs, IAs, programmatic monitoring requirements. Re-checked May 2026: site is bot-protected (JS challenge) so cannot be auto-scraped. Manual watch only.

portals.name: Impact Assessment Agency of Canada (IAAC)
portals.notes: Registry of all federal IAs. Read-only signal source - flags upcoming work for proponents who will then tender via CanadaBuys. Manual watch recommended.

portals.name: MARA - Maritime Area Regulatory Authority (Ireland)
portals.notes: New 2024 Irish regulator for offshore wind consenting. Posts tenders via eTenders Ireland (now scraped). This page is the authority reference.

portals.name: Cenovus Energy - Suppliers
portals.notes: Owns 50% Hibernia. Atlantic Canada offshore O&G - direct relevance to Edgewise NL work. Auth-walled via SAP Ariba.

portals.name: Suncor Energy - Suppliers
portals.notes: Hibernia partner; Terra Nova operator. Atlantic Canada offshore O&G. Auth-walled via SAP Ariba.

portals.name: Doffin (Norway)
portals.notes: Norwegian public procurement. Sub-threshold notices captured here; above-threshold cross-post to TED (already scraped). Scraper uses Doffin Public API v2 with a free Azure subscription key (set as GitHub Actions secret DOFFIN_API_KEY). Equinor sub-threshold, Norwegian Environment Agency, Sørlige Nordsjø II / Utsira Nord offshore wind.

portals.name: SAP Ariba Discovery
portals.notes: Free supplier registration; matches RFXs across Ariba customers (CanadaBuys, Equinor, Ørsted etc). Edgewise should register if not already - opens visibility to buyers who don't post to public portals.

portals.name: Asian Development Bank
portals.notes: Multilateral development bank covering Asia-Pacific. Pacific island marine work, fisheries projects, coastal climate adaptation. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: African Development Bank
portals.notes: Multilateral development bank covering Africa. West/East African coastal climate-adaptation studies and small-scale fisheries. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: UN Global Marketplace (UNGM)
portals.notes: United Nations system procurement portal (UNDP, UNEP, UNOPS, FAO, WFP, WHO, UNICEF, UNHCR, IMO, IAEA, UNFCCC, plus crossposts from World Bank/ADB/AfDB and others). The page itself is JavaScript-rendered, but the AJAX search endpoint is reachable directly. Scraper covers this. Free supplier registration on UNGM still recommended for full document download access.

portals.name: DevelopmentAid
portals.notes: Aggregator of donor-funded tenders worldwide (EU, UN, World Bank, AfDB, ADB). Sometimes lists tenders before the source portal indexes them. Free tier limited; paid tier gives full search. Useful as a backup manual check.

portals.name: Tenders.net
portals.notes: General tender aggregator. Re-checked May 2026: blocks automated access (HTTP 403). Manual browse only.
